content: Canonical schema: tenants, sessions, skills, rate-limits, cost-tracking, audit. All use TENANT#{id} as PK. See ClawCore-Final-Architecture-Plan.md

title: Project codename: AWS Chimera
rationale: Multi-formed Greek creature reflects multi-tenant, multi-agent, multi-platform, self-evolving nature. AWS internal codename style (Bedrock, Mantle, Kuiper). CLI: chimera deploy/agent/skill.

name: self-modifying-iac-dynamodb-cdk
description: DynamoDB-driven CDK synthesis enables agent-autonomous infrastructure. Pattern: DynamoDB tenant config → Streams → Lambda synthesis → CodePipeline auto-deploy. Eliminates manual CDK edits for tenant onboarding.

content: L3 construct pattern for multi-tenant isolation: TenantAgent construct encapsulates 15+ resources with built-in security (DynamoDB partition DENY, S3 prefix scoping, tier-based model access). 318 lines replace 600+ lines of HCL. Enables rapid tenant provisioning with security defaults.

title: Continue AWS CDK for IaC (reject OpenTofu/Pulumi)
rationale: Type safety prevents multi-tenant errors, L3 constructs reduce boilerplate 60%, AWS-native Bedrock support same-day, self-modifying patterns achievable via DynamoDB-driven synthesis. Migration cost 6 weeks unjustified.
